title: Gorilla 3044020 Tape All Weather Extreme Black 48mm x 11m
description: From the manufacturer Gorilla All Weather Extreme Tape 11m Gorilla Tape All-Weather Extreme is the tough tape for extreme weather conditions. Extra-strong and extra-durable, it’s perfect for permanent outdoor repairs. This tough tape is 100% waterproof and works in hot & cold temperatures – holding strong in rain, snow, sun, and extreme weather conditions. Product Features Works in Hot & Cold Temperatures It works in hot and cold temperatures, holding strong in rain, snow and sun. It’s long-lasting and sticks to rough and uneven surfaces – the low-tack adhesive might not feel sticky but it’s incredibly strong. Waterproof Gorilla Tape All-Weather Extreme is designed for extreme outdoor conditions. That means it’s 100% waterproof and can even stick to wet surfaces.† † Peel strength reduces when applied to wet surfaces. Surfaces must be non-porous, clean and free of any coatings or coverings. Pressure must be applied for a minimum of 30 seconds. Permanent Bond Gorilla Tape All-Weather Extreme is tough and extra-durable. It’s perfect for permanent outdoor repairs.
